title: roldana neogibsonii
intro: Roldana neogibsonii, also known as the Mexican gold daisy or Roldana, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Roldana neogibsonii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Roldana neogibsonii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource for those seeking natural remedies.
